ListBaseDdos.ips: Public IP addresses, multiple addresses separated by ",", maximum count up to 1000
ListBaseDdos.type: Public IP type, default is ipv4, optional values are ipv4 and ipv6
ListBaseDdos.marker: The starting position for batch list queries, a system-generated string
ListBaseDdos.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000. Default value is 1000
